creator: toyonaga@msd.ts.fujitsu.co.jp
text:
ports/graphics/opendx compiles and istalls well, but
the script /usr/local/dx/bin/dxworker seems to have
many bugs. consequencely the dx command do nothing
good for me...

Fix: 

I've found some oddities in /usr/local/dx/bin/dxworker.
line 28: set remove=/usr/bin/rsh seems typo for set remote=...
line 139: dxroot should point to /usr/local/dx (maybe)
line 1454: case freebsd -> case i386
Maybe more bugs exists,
please do clean install of this port and examine/validate it
really work with companion opendx-samples port.
How-To-Repeat: invoke dx and select New Visual Program, or directry
call /usr/local/dx/bin/dxworker
